programs.title: Never Say Never Again
programs.desc: An aging James Bond (Sean Connery) makes an uncharacteristic mistake during a routine training mission, leading M (Edward Fox) to believe that the legendary British Intelligence spy is now past his prime. M indefinitely suspends Bond from active duty. However, when SPECTRE member Fatima Bush (Barbara Carrera) and her fellow terrorists successfully steal two nuclear missiles from the U.S. military, M must reinstate Bond, as he is the only agent who can beat SPECTRE at their own game of espionage.

programs.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programs.desc: Maggie and Cal find themselves facing a dire situation as they look for a missing camper.

programs.title: Perfectly a Strangeness
programs.desc: In the incandescence of an unknown desert, three donkeys discover an abandoned astronomical observatory and the universe.

programs.title: It: Chapter Two
programs.desc: Defeated by members of the Losers' Club, the evil clown Pennywise returns 27 years later to terrorize the town of Derry, Maine, once again. Now adults, the childhood friends have long since gone their separate ways. But when people start disappearing, Mike Hanlon calls the others home for one final stand. Damaged by scars from the past, the united Losers must conquer their deepest fears to destroy the shape-shifting Pennywise -- now more powerful than ever.

programs.title: Reality Bites: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programs.desc: Hannah's favorite reality show takes over "The Cookie Jar." When the producer is found dead, Hannah and Norman team up to track down the killer. Chad invites Hannah to court.

programs.title: Transplant
programs.desc: Bash wants to make things right with Amira after their lives are turned upside down once again.
